name: OCU P7 — Cross-Cutting Adversarial Cases
description: 20 adversarial scenarios covering malformed sources, misbehaving LLM responses, thinker unreachable, slow disk, low VRAM, pathological frame rates, and other hostile conditions. All reference go tests inside pkg/nexus that exercise error paths.

metadata._llm_driven_reason: Vision-driven test suite per HelixQA Constitution §1 (Fully Autonomous LLM-Driven QA): prose actions are interpreted by the vision model. Article XI §11.5 exemption.

test_cases.name: engine-unsupported-action-kind
test_cases.expected_result: Engine.Perform returns error for unknown ActionKind; Result.Success=false

test_cases.name: engine-nil-context-cancelled
test_cases.expected_result: Interactor error captured in Result.Error; Perform itself returns nil error

test_cases.name: engine-capture-no-frame
test_cases.expected_result: Result.Error contains 'no frame available'; Success=false

test_cases.name: engine-capture-closed-channel
test_cases.expected_result: Result.Error contains 'frames channel closed'; Success=false

test_cases.name: engine-analyze-vision-error

steps.name: Analyze with vision pipeline returning error

test_cases.expected_result: Vision error captured in Result.Error; Perform returns nil error

test_cases.name: engine-record-clip-recorder-error
test_cases.expected_result: Clip error captured in Result.Error; Perform returns nil error

test_cases.name: bridge-nil-engine
test_cases.expected_result: ExecuteAction returns descriptive error; does not panic

test_cases.name: replay-script-empty-actions
test_cases.expected_result: BuildReplayScript returns empty string without panic

test_cases.name: replay-script-special-chars-in-text

steps.name: BuildReplayScript with special chars in Type action

test_cases.expected_result: Special characters quoted via %q; no unescaped newlines in middle of line

test_cases.name: from-automation-result-empty
test_cases.expected_result: Returns empty slice without panic

test_cases.name: engine-stress-100-goroutines
test_cases.expected_result: All 100 concurrent Perform calls return without data race or panic

test_cases.name: capture-pathological-frame-rate-zero
test_cases.expected_result: Zero FPS config handled without division-by-zero or panic

test_cases.name: vision-low-vram-dispatch

steps.name: VisionPipeline.Analyze with zero GPU memory available

test_cases.expected_result: CPU backend serves as fallback when GPU VRAM is zero

test_cases.name: recorder-clip-zero-window

steps.name: RecordClip with zero window returns all buffered frames

test_cases.expected_result: Clip with window=0 returns all buffered data without error

test_cases.name: interactor-type-empty-string
test_cases.expected_result: Empty text injection dispatches without error

test_cases.name: observer-events-channel-closed
test_cases.expected_result: Engine handles closed events channel without panic

test_cases.name: engine-elapsed-always-positive

steps.name: All ActionKinds produce positive Elapsed even on stub stubs

test_cases.expected_result: Result.Elapsed >= 1ns for all ActionKinds regardless of stub speed

test_cases.name: vision-diff-identical-frames
test_cases.expected_result: Diff returns TotalDelta=0 or very small; does not panic

test_cases.name: engine-drag-zero-distance

steps.name: Engine drag with At == To (zero-distance drag)

test_cases.expected_result: Zero-distance drag dispatches without error

test_cases.name: bank-duplicate-id-rejected

steps.name: Testbank loader rejects bank with duplicate IDs

test_cases.expected_result: LoadFile returns error describing the duplicate test case ID
